CustomField.description: Number of days after a membership Opportunity's end date during which the membership status remains "Grace Period" before transitioning to "Expired." Default is 30 days. Affects membership rollup calculations on Contacts and Accounts. Set to 0 to transition immediately to Expired status.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days after a membership expires before status changes from "Grace Period" to "Expired." Default is 30.
CustomField.label: Membership Grace Period
